title: gemeinwohl: Normative Common-Good Layer with Governance Metrics, Personhood Extension and Ethical Guardrails for GenesisAeon
description: gemeinwohl implements a normative metric layer for AI governance within the GenesisAeon ecosystem. It provides the GemeinwohlEngine for computing common-good scores from entropy, model alignment, normative consistency, personhood weighting, ecological impact, and social equity; a KritikalitaetsChecker for ethical implication analysis; a PolicyEngine with five-tier personhood model; and a Typer CLI. The package integrates with the full GenesisAeon stack (unified-mandala, worldview, aeon-ai, genesis-os, universums-sim, entropy-governance, sigillin).
